# Tasks.IsTerminalTaskStatus method

Returns `true` when *status* is a terminal state — Completed, Failed, or Cancelled (§25.5, R-25.5-b). A terminal task's status and inline payload are immutable.

```csharp
public static bool IsTerminalTaskStatus(McpTaskStatus status)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| status | The status to test. |

## Return Value

`true` when the status is terminal.
